# EPub-InkPlate Config File — test fixture
# -----------------------------------------
#
# This hand-crafted file exercises every entry type (STRING, INT, INT64, BYTE)
# and is used by test_app_config.cpp to verify that the application-level
# Config singleton reads all fields correctly.
#
# All values deliberately differ from their compiled-in defaults so that the
# test can confirm the file was actually read.

version = 1
wifi_ssid = "TestSSID"
wifi_pwd = "TestPWD"
dns_name = "testplate"
ap_wifi_ssid = "testplate-ap"
ap_wifi_pwd = "ap-secret"
http_port = 8080
battery = 1
timeout = 30
font_size = 10
default_font = 0
use_fonts_in_books = 0
show_images = 1
orientation = 0
resolution = 1
show_heap = 1
show_title = 0
front_light = 32
dir_view = 1
cover_size = 1
